name: Ukucindezela Okuqondile Kokulawulwa Kokopha
description: Umugqa wokuqala wokulawula ukopha emaphethelweni afinyelelekayo kanye namanxeba omzimba.
steps: Gcoba indwangu yokuhlukumezeka noma indwangu egoqiwe ngqo phezu kwenxeba.
Cindezela ngokuqinile ngesithende sesandla sakho. Sebenzisa isisindo somzimba wakho -- hhayi nje amandla engalo.
Bamba ingcindezi eqhubekayo, engaphazamiseki okungenani imizuzu emi-3.
UNGAKULISI okokugqoka ukuze uhlole -- lokhu kuphazamisa ukwakheka kwehlule.
Uma ukopha kungena, engeza enye ingubo phezulu. Ungasusi owokuqala.
Vikela ngebhandeshi elicindezelayo uma litholakala futhi uye endaweni yokupakisha amanxeba noma ku-tourniquet uma ukopha kuqhubeka.
warnings: Ingcindezi eqondile iyodwa ayinele ukopha kwe-arterial -- ikhuphukela ekupakishweni kwezilonda noma i-tourniquet.
Izilonda ezihlangene (i-groin, i-axilla, intamo) zidinga ukupakishwa kwamanxeba, hhayi ukucindezela kwangaphandle kuphela.

pediatric.note: Ingcindezi elinganayo kuphela. Gwema ukucindezela ithorax ezinganeni.

obstetric.note: Gwema ukucindezela okukhulu phezu kwesibeletho se-gravid. Sebenzisa i-lateral packing uma inxeba elihlangene eduze kwe-pelvis.
